curation_notes: Patch commit 46de5d0 adds a ctx.lookup(principal.toString()) call inside getLdapContextUsingStartTls in LdapRealm.java. Without this lookup, the LDAP context was configured with credentials but authentication was never triggered when using STARTTLS. The pre-assigned class auth-bypass (CWE-287) is correct — the vulnerability allows login with any valid username and arbitrary password. Only 1 non-test source file was changed. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern; getSystemLdapContextUsingStartTls delegates to the same fixed function.
